<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Solutions\SolutionProviders; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\Laravel\MissingImportSolutionProvider as BaseMissingImportSolutionProviderAlias; use Spatie\Ignition\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; class MissingImportSolutionProvider extends BaseMissingImportSolutionProviderAlias implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { }
